title: Keshel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''keshel''' was a unit of [[Currency/Legends|currency]] used in the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colonies on [[Tyne's Horky]]. The value of a keshel was based upon the [[Keschel]]-standard, a rare [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] found on Tyne's Horky.

==Appearances==
*{{DroidsCite|The Lost Prince}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
